text.title: Stakeholder Engagement (Advanced) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: introduce: kickoff email + project FAQ + 1 informational meeting
1:1 listen → co-author requirements → joint sign-off; never email-only
demonstrate personal benefit; ask for input; quantify in their KPIs
give visible role + share strategic info + public recognition
direct outreach within 48h; document blocker reason
